Defines functions and callbacks for managing action chaining windows in the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This header file defines an interface for managing an action chaining window in a user interface application. It includes two function pointer typedefs, `ActionChainingMenuSelectCb` and `ActionChainingMenuClosedCb`, which are callback functions for handling menu selection and menu closure events, respectively. The function [`action_chaining_window_push`](<#action_chaining_window_push>) is declared to push a new window onto the `WindowStack`, allowing the user to interact with a menu of actions defined by a `TimelineItemActionGroup`. This function takes several parameters, including the window stack, a title for the window, the action group, and the callback functions with their respective contexts. The file includes necessary dependencies from `applib/ui/window_stack.h` and `services/normal/timeline/item.h`.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `applib/ui/window_stack.h`
- `services/normal/timeline/item.h`
